results.title: BSF Duo Sentenced to 42 Years for Rape, Acid Attack
results.description: Kashmir, Observer, Jammu, Srinagar, Latest Kashmir News, Kashmir News, Kashmir Latest News court in Mizoram's Aizawl district on Tuesday sentenced two Border Security Force (BSF) jawans to 42 years of rigorous imprisonment for raping a woman and attacking her with acid in 2017. The post BSF Duo Sentenced to 42 Years for Rape, Acid Attack appeared first on Kashmir Observer .
